subcodes.first_line: O thou trusted one of Abdu'l-Baha! That which thou didst write was perused. In brief, the winds of tests and trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید مختصر اینست که اریاح امتحان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
